message: Completed LEDrums Content App MVP: pure core engine (geometry/effects/compositor), io (Art-Net/sACN/OSC), server render-loop host with armable pixel output, Svelte5+Threlte web visualizer + authoring UI. 121 tests green. Doc-review findings (DMX output topology, density 120, output safety state machine, replay determinism, typed mutations) folded into the build.

Refreshed .mex docs to current reality: 41 effects/7 categories + UV-field sampler, setlist/song/section + 8-slot trigger routing, 120px/m + per-drum output topology, tube-segment visualizer (tangent/normal). Added add-an-effect pattern runbook; fixed INDEX placeholder links; documented clean script.

Arrange trigger model pivoting from flat (drum,slot)->clip bindings to a trigger behavior-tree (one-shot/loop, all/random/sequence/switch, chance/toggle) over voice buses (layer mono/poly + crossfade) with section morph/blend. Building a throwaway interactive probe at apps/web/src/lib/trigger-lab (?proto=trigger) to decide voice-model / block-set / section-blend branches before the slice-3 core model refactor.

Bridged voices to the legacy EffectGenerator registry: a voice can host a whole-frame generator (generatorId+genState), compositor renders it into a scratch FB scaled by envelope + scope-masked, fed one synthetic per-voice trigger. All 41 original effects now live + selectable on server and offline preview (render.ts delegates to the same core generators). Kept as a permanent whole-frame render strategy (Trent's call), not a temp patch. Commit 1ec20f1.

Patch graph made authoritative over real routing (S1-S4 on feat/unified-shell): rewiring the output half reorders the Art-Net pixel stream via kit.outputs->dmxMap; per-node Inspector editors for drum geometry/input MIDI-OSC/routing/controller transport; hoops take a literal pixelsPerHoop (not density); voice host made runtime-mutable (live kit reload + setKitOutputs). Server Project is source of truth; setKitOutputs is voice-mode only. Full sweep green (402 tests). Live :5173 spot-check still owed.

Patch-graph-authoritative cleanup S5 done (333f4b2/d3d7d37/f5a9e0c): (a) node-face renames; (b) data-line/output read-outs derive from live graph routing so palette-added + reordered lines resolve stats (fixes the no-stats-on-new-datalines bug from live testing); (c) sACN priority + port/iface plumbed end-to-end. Full sweep 407 tests green. Remaining: Save-project-to-disk (survive server restart) unbuilt; live :5173 spot-check owed.

value-switch (on:'value', gate+bands) now evaluated in packages/core engine, mirrored from web sim; show-builder bridge cast dropped as web<->core graph types re-converged. Value routing reaches real output, not just the local sim.

S6 (data lines first-class + dense/straddle DMX packing + kit pixel defaults Kick196/snare108/tom1 108/tom2 136), S7 (live project autosave + single-client lock), S8 (rail Views-above-Songs), U1 (trigger-source Drum/MIDI/OSC model) all done + integrated green (462 tests). Started consolidated trigger-source+sections initiative: V (velocity→value fold) in flight, queue U2→U3→U4→U5.

U2 done (trigger-node Drum/MIDI/OSC Inspector editor + node sub-line, f606f1f); cold-load fix done (Patch adopts server kit.outputs on cold load, 04bc25d — your routing was always server-persisted, view just wasn't reacting). U3 (input routing: zone-map precedence + direct midi/osc bindings, no double-fire) in flight.

U3 (trigger-source input routing) merged 8ec6745 — zone-map precedence then direct midi/osc bindings, structural no-double-fire; normalizeTriggerValue mirrored to core. Hoop-spacing (4d2f3b6) + diameter (64d2f35) drum-node geometry done via parallel worktree agents. Full sweep 519 tests green. U4 (sections flat + Play-Surface swap, locked decisions: flat graph list + merged active section) launched in worktree.

U4 (sections as flat graph lists + Play-Surface replacement + merged active section) merged 8778e54, 541 tests green. Launched parallel worktree batch: U5 (copy/paste sections) + fix-integrity (assertShowIntegrity must accept authored graph keys so connected setShow with MIDI/OSC-bound authored graphs doesn't throw).

Triggers-as-nodes + sections initiative COMPLETE (HEAD 4915771): U1 trigger-source model, V velocity->value fold, U2 source Inspector, U3 input routing (zone-map precedence + direct midi/osc, no double-fire), U4 sections-flat + Play-Surface replacement + merged active section, U5 copy/paste sections, plus hoop-spacing, drum-diameter, patch cold-load fix, assertShowIntegrity authored-graph fix. All merged via parallel git-worktree agents, full sweep 555 tests green. Live :5173 spot-check owed.

Orchestrator handoff 2026-06-27 → fresh /twux orch. Session complete: patch-graph-authoritative (S1-S8 + fixes) + triggers-as-nodes+sections (U1-U5 + V + fixes), 555 tests green, feat/unified-shell @6135b96, not merged to main. Next mission: CRUD completeness pass + custom context-menu handler + remove Kit view→Perform view (collapse the Perform/Author mode toggle). Brief: docs/handoff/2026-06-27-crud-perform-handoff.md.

CRUD + ContextMenu + Kit→Perform initiative complete: 7 worktree impl agents (ctx-menu, shell de-mode/Kit→Perform, section/song/graph CRUD, show document model + browser), orchestrator-merged, 618 tests green at 2b2c651. Designed via codebase-design→to-prd→to-issues. Live :5173 spot-check owed.

Initiative 2 complete: 7 worktree impl agents (recall-transport, graphs-generic, objects-crud, objects-view, section-inspector, shows-server-persist, save-indicator), orchestrator-merged, 699 tests green at 8227e6d. Server-authoritative show persistence + global MIDI/OSC transport recall the headline features. Componentisation pass is next (own plan). Live :5173 spot-check owed.

Trigger/Effects initiative complete (HEAD 2be62b5): (1) Delay node fires children after a RELATIVE real-time offset from the hit (division->ms at enqueue bpm), NOT grid-quantized; deterministic pending-fire queue in core engine + web sim, drained in tick() at absolute fireAtMs, shared computeDelayMs from core. (2) Per-effect scope kit/drum/hoop + targetId ('id' or 'id#hoopIndex'); targetId??sourceDrumId, kit ignores target, generators scoped too. (3) Effect thumbnails render the real generator via a shared rAF ticker + IntersectionObserver offscreen-pause + reduced-motion.

Trigger-graph spot-check fixes (3bd27d9/a1fc99f): xyflow TriggerGraphView.rebuildNodes must REUSE the existing flow-node object for unchanged nodes — rebuilding fresh objects each projection failed xyflow's reference-equality check, dropping edge handleBounds (wires vanish on add) and re-applying store x/y (nodes snap; snapped pos then autosaved -> first node reset every refresh). Also added a beforeunload autosave flush. Generator thumbnails: render on a 26x13 synthetic buildThumbPixelModel (not the full kit) and paint true Framebuffer RGB (no rgbToHue round-trip); IntersectionObserver ignores pre-layout offscreen fires in the portaled gallery.
Gen3 graph authoring PRD split into GitHub issues #67-#78; implementation will be coordinated through worker Codex threads, with each slice committing and pushing to codex/gen3-graph-authoring.
Gen3 trigger graph hydration canonicalizes play/output into effect/scope and enforces one terminal Output anchor.
Implemented Gen3 output-gated rendering and cascading Scope intersections in core and offline sim.
Implemented issue #71 Add Node pane v2 foundation: two-stage Add drawer, resizable Node Editor, and click/drag node placement plumbing.
Gen3 S04 Add Node taxonomy centralizes palette groups, keeps Mix disabled until runtime lands, and seeds Envelope/LFO presets as ordinary source nodes.
Implemented Gen3 S06 Scope inspector/preview with multi-hoop target encoding and effective-scope readouts.
Gen3 S07 adds Slice as a core spatial modifier with deterministic per-voice band remap state and registry-driven Modify palette discovery.
